stemHtml:
The IAS or Mach hold mode is provided by:

1 – the autopilot pitch channel in the climb mode at a constant IAS or Mach Number
2 – the auto-throttles in the climb mode at a constant IAS or Mach Number
3 – the autopilot pitch channel in the altitude or glide path hold mode
4 – the auto-throttles in the altitude or glide path holding mode

The combination that regroups all of the correct statements is…
